programme.desc: A CIA operative arranges a grisly fate for a fellow spy who found out that he was working as a double agent. The killer makes the murder look like a random mugging, but he is not as clever as he thinks and the crumpled cop soon begins to pick up on the trail of clues he has left behind. Crime drama, directed by and starring Patrick McGoohan, with Peter Falk and Leslie Nielsen

programme.title: Columbo: Old Fashioned Murder (1976)
programme.desc: A woman who has devoted her life to running her family's museum is outraged when her brother decides to sell it. Knowing of someone with criminal connections, she arranges to have her brother killed. However, just when she starts to think she has got away with it, a certain shabby sleuth is assigned to the case. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Joyce Van Patten, Celeste Holm and Tim O'Connor

programme.title: Columbo: Short Fuse (1972)
programme.desc: The son of a chemical company's founder is blackmailed by his uncle, who wants to force him into selling the business. The cunning heir responds by murdering his relative with a box of exploding cigars, but finds himself facing the dishevelled detective, who is convinced the resulting fatal detonation was no accident. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Roddy McDowall and Ida Lupino

programme.title: Columbo: A Stitch in Crime (1973)
programme.desc: Surgeon Barry Mayfield decides he needs get rid of his colleague to speed along a research project. When his partner requires heart surgery, Mayfield performs the operation himself and discreetly arranges some fatal complications. However, when he also murders a nurse who suspects the truth, he attracts the attention of the slovenly sleuth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Leonard Nimoy and Will Geer

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Dangerous Match (1973)
programme.desc: An American chess champion fears he is about to be beaten by a superior player from Russia, and decides the only sure-fire way he can avoid defeat is by murdering his opponent. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Laurence Harvey and Jack Kruschen

programme.title: Columbo: By Dawn's Early Light (1974)
programme.desc: The commandant of a military academy is outraged by the chairman of the board's plans to admit female cadets, so he stages a fatal accident involving a ceremonial cannon. However, Columbo is not fooled by the deception and sets out to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Patrick McGoohan, Tom Simcox and Mark Wheeler

programme.title: Columbo: A Deadly State of Mind (1975)
programme.desc: A philandering psychiatrist, who involved his mistress in a series of hypnosis experiments, kills her husband in the heat of the moment when the pair are caught out. He persuades his distraught lover to make up a story involving two burglars, but Lt Columbo realises she is lying and goes in search of the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, George Hamilton and Lesley Warren

programme.title: Columbo: Suitable for Framing (1971)
programme.desc: A millionaire art collector is thought to have been killed as the result of a random burglary. However, Columbo is convinced the dead man's nephew committed the crime to avoid being written out of the will, and embarks on a mission to ensnare his suspect. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Ross Martin and Don Ameche

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.desc: Follow alien robot Zeek as he tries to find out some fascinating facts about our animal kingdom

programme.desc: The Black Elf challenges the geese to a race in order to win a magic crystal

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Gorgo worries about why he is different from the other birds, and may be close to discovering that he is not really a goose

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Animated fantasy adventures

programme.title: Underwater World for Kids
programme.desc: An underwater adventure that takes in the many natural wonders and magical sea creatures above and below our oceans

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: A new commanding officer pushes the team too hard, leaving the overworked team planning a revolt. Ash and Susan consider their future

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Teenage shepherd Phillip Mellin tries to set up his sheepdog training business, and community pub the George and Dragon in Hudswell, Richmondshire, hosts a Fijian festival. Plus, fashion designer Izzy Lane photographs her latest collection, produced using the wool from her rescued Wensleydale sheep. Adrian Edmondson presents

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Local vicar Ann Chapman hosts the annual 'Party in the Parish', and Adrian Edmondson meets members of a North Yorkshire family who are competing at Masham Steam Fair with their engine Lightning Two. Plus, farmers the Owens head off for a well-deserved break

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Documentary investigating allegations that a lack of proper controls is allowing financial, physical and even sexual abuse to take place within Britain's mosques. Over a year in the making, this programme exposes how worshippers' generosity can be exploited by religious leaders and how extreme groups can assume control of a community

programme.title: Piccadilly Incident (1946)
programme.desc: A Wren is pronounced missing in action, but returns three years later to find her husband has remarried. Melodrama, starring Anna Neagle and Michael Wilding

programme.title: Angels One Five (1953)
programme.desc: A new recruit joins a squadron of British fighter pilots in the summer of 1940, as they prepare to face a confrontation with the overwhelming forces of the Luftwaffe over the English Channel, while the ground crew at their base anxiously awaits reports from the conflict. Second World War adventure, starring Jack Hawkins and John Gregson

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: The team visits a Northamptonshire hotel that needs to make improvements, tackles cockroaches in a kitchen in Brent, north London, and makes a surprise inspection on a busy office to find out what dangers workers face when eating lunch at their desks

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Gary ditches his sweatshirt and trainers to get himself suited and booted for a date with Phoebe. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst and Dervla Kirwan

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Featuring Lee, Bermondsey and Stratford. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Old Guys
programme.desc: When Roy befriends an old flame from Sally's past, it looks like Tom is set to lose any hope of getting together with his neighbour, as well as his best friend. To make matters worse, Amber demands to know why her father has never told her that he loves her. Comedy, guest starring Clive Russell

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Mick's preaching starts to annoy the neighbours and Dirk Bogarde reveals some information to the police. Comedy, written and performed by John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: The Wipers Times
programme.desc: In the bombed-out ruins of the Belgian town of Ypres in 1916, Captain Fred Roberts and Lieutenant Jack Pearson discover a printing press and decide to start a satirical newspaper to raise the spirits of the British troops. It proves hugely popular with the men in the trenches - but their superior officers see it as an act of insubordination and subversion and call for a ban. Feature-length factual drama by Ian Hislop and Nick Newman, starring Ben Chaplin, Julian Rhind-Tutt, Michael Palin and Emilia Fox

programme.title: The Face of Love (2013)
programme.desc: A widow begins a new relationship with a man who is the exact double of her husband, and shares many of his personality traits. Over time, she grows to love his own unique qualities, but fears he will leave her if he ever discovers the resemblance. Romantic drama, starring Annette Bening, Ed Harris and Robin Williams

programme.title: The Old Guys
programme.desc: When Roy befriends an old flame from Sally's past, it looks like Tom is set to lose any hope of getting together with his neighbour, as well as his best friend. To make matters worse, Amber demands to know why her father has never told her that he loves her. Comedy, guest starring Clive Russell

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: A bomb is found in a nightclub which German scientists claim cannot be disarmed, and Ash receives a mysterious message. Guest starring Judy Geeson (the original 1970s Poldark)

programme.title: News Rewind
programme.desc: A digest of news and events from across London from the past few days

programme.title: Talking Points
programme.desc: A chance to catch up on debates about the issues behind the headlines

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: A heart warming and inspiring series that welcomes the arrival of new members of the animal kingdom in Zoo's around the world, as well as showcasing endangered species being born in captivity

programme.title: Zot the Dog
programme.desc: The tales of Zot, a good-hearted, fun-loving but rather bouncy dog and his best pal, Clive

programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Susan decides to go back to her husband, while Ash gets some help from the Navy in learning hoe to dispose of new German land mines

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: A TV repairman discovers he can travel between the present and the Second World War - and finds romance in the past. First episode of the comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, Dervla Kirwan and Michelle Holmes

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Gary ditches his sweatshirt and trainers to get himself suited and booted for a date with Phoebe. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst and Dervla Kirwan

programme.title: Iron Men (2017)
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes with the fans of West Ham United as they move to a new home after 112 years at Upton Park. Featuring Slaven Bilic, Mark Noble Mabel Arnold and Ray Winstone

programme.title: Clambake (1967)
programme.desc: A millionaire's son is determined to succeed on his own, so changes places with a poor water-skiing instructor to prove he can live without the perks of wealth. Musical, with Elvis Presley, Shelley Fabares, Bill Bixby and Will Hutchins

programme.title: The Chiltern Hundreds (1949)
programme.desc: An aristocrat fails to be elected as a Tory MP, so decides to stand for Labour instead, only to learn his butler, determined to maintain class distinctions, is running against him. Comedy, starring Cecil Parker, AE Matthews and David Tomlinson

programme.title: Taste of Marley
programme.desc: Rohan Marley, son of legendary musician Bob Marley, reconnects with his roots as he goes on a journey to explore the food and music of his native Jamaica

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events showcasing London's vibrant culture scene

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Hitler's V1 flying bombs were responsible for the deaths of nearly 6,000 people in London and the South of England. This episode features accounts from the men and women whose job was to fight the V1s from the ground and a report on the impact of a bomb that hit a chapel one Sunday morning, killing 121 people

programme.title: London's Screen Archives Presents
programme.desc: A special compilation of historical short films themed around travel from Film London's London Screen Archives

programme.title: On the Up
programme.desc: Tony worries how he will explain Ruth walking out on him to his mother as concerns about her health prompt him to consider getting her to move in with him

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Soho and Milllwall, with fascinating facts for locals and tourists alike. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Escape from Sobibor (1987)
programme.desc: New arrivals at a Nazi concentration camp realise they do not have long to live as the Nazi campaign of genocide gathers speed. The commandant threatens to execute one prisoner for every escape attempt - leading the inmates to realise that the only hope is for all 600 of them to break out together. Drama based on the true story of the largest uprising during the Holocaust, starring Alan Arkin, Joanna Pacula and Rutger Hauer

programme.title: Nothing But the Truth (2008)
programme.desc: A reporter uncovers an international political scandal, but breaking the story entails revealing the identity of an undercover CIA agent. She refuses to reveal her source to the government, and is imprisoned. While she takes her legal battle to the supreme court, the exposed spy finds her career on the line and her life in danger. Thriller, starring Kate Beckinsale and Vera Farmiga

programme.title: Villain (1971)
programme.desc: A sadistic London gangster seeks to rid his organisation of traitors while plotting to blackmail members of parliament. Crime drama, with Richard Burton and Ian McShane

programme.desc: Documentary exploring areas of the capital, beginning with Shooters Hill, Charlton, Greenwich and Blackheath.

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events showcasing London's vibrant culture scene

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Malham blacksmith Annabelle Bradley starts work on her latest commission, and Adrian Edmondson meets a farmer who is hoping to win the Dales' toughest fell run in Wharfedale. Plus, members of the Otley & Yorkshire Dales branch of the Dry Stone Walling Association build a new packhorse bridge

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Adrian Edmondson catches up with young farmer Phillip Mellin and his mother Carol as they end dairy production and sell their cows at auction. He also visits the Dalehead Veterinary Group in Settle to witness the vets treating a horse with a serious injury, while Malham blacksmith Annabelle Bradley completes the traditional chandeliers she has been producing for her local pub

programme.title: The Exception (2016)
programme.desc: A German soldier tries to determine if the Dutch resistance has planted a spy to infiltrate the home of Kaiser Wilhelm in Holland during the onset of the Second World War, but falls for a young Jewish-Dutch woman during his investigation. Drama, starring Lily James, Jai Courtney and Christopher Plummer

programme.title: The Wipers Times
programme.desc: In the bombed-out ruins of the Belgian town of Ypres in 1916, Captain Fred Roberts and Lieutenant Jack Pearson discover a printing press and decide to start a satirical newspaper to raise the spirits of the British troops. It proves hugely popular with the men in the trenches - but their superior officers see it as an act of insubordination and subversion and call for a ban. Feature-length factual drama by Ian Hislop and Nick Newman, starring Ben Chaplin, Julian Rhind-Tutt, Michael Palin and Emilia Fox

programme.title: Purge of Kingdoms (2019)
programme.desc: The leaders of eight rival noble houses gather for a festival designed to settle their long-standing feuds once and for all. Meanwhile, the king who rules over them all has to contend with his own family plotting to have him assassinated. Fantasy spoof, starring Angus MacFadyen and Lou Ferrigno

programme.title: Earth Cycle
programme.desc: Simon Parker charts the seasonal cycles of the natural world as he journeys through Scandinavia on a bicycle, wild camping, seeing animal migrations and sampling local food

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Crystal Palace and Shoreditch. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: News Rewind
programme.desc: A digest of news and events from across London from the past few days

programme.title: Talking Points
programme.desc: Interviews on news and events from across London

programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner
